weaknesses: No explicit experience with data refresh/dataflow tooling
improvement_bullets: Optimized data governance and documentation by standardizing KPIs and metadata taxonomies, ensuring data integrity across all marketing analytics workstreams.
Managed end-to-end dataflow creation and automated data refreshes for Power BI dashboards, reducing manual latency and ensuring stakeholders have real-time access to high-impact reporting.
Facilitated a 'Service/Self-Service' analytics enablement model by training non-technical team members on data exploration, directly supporting the organization-wide measurement framework.
Integrated workflow management tools similar to Airtable to track project lifecycles, ensuring timely delivery of cross-functional analytics initiatives.
Collaborated with IT teams to scale technical infrastructure, applying best practices in dbt-style modular transformations to improve the reliability and efficiency of our data processing pipelines.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Sr Analyst, Analytics Ops, M&C opportunity with TekWissen®. I am interested in this opportunity because of its focus on bridging operational excellence with high-impact clinical research. What interests me about working for TekWissen® on behalf of your client is their mission to end cancer for life, which inspires me because I am passionate about applying data-driven strategies to meaningful, life-saving institutional goals. I believe my expertise in workflow optimization and my proficiency in building scalable analytics ecosystems would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with an intrapreneurial mindset, consistently seeking ways to improve how work gets done. In fact, at Shine Masters, I replaced manual reporting with interactive Power BI dashboards and automated intake workflows via Zapier. This initiative saved 8 hours per week and increased new customer acquisition by 300% over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Sr Analyst, Analytics Ops, M&C role at TekWissen® would allow me to bring my background in process design to streamline your analytics operations. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my data governance and documentation skills. I spearheaded the creation of standardized SOPs and operational workflows, which reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent data reporting across the firm. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in technical infrastructure management in working on the BI ecosystem at your client's institution. I know that my proficiency in SQL/Python and my commitment to operational efficiency align with what it takes to succeed at the Sr Analyst, Analytics Ops, M&C role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
